allow: Bash(php -r '$d=json_decode\(file_get_contents\("./_svc.json"\),true\); echo "success=".var_export\($d["success"]??null,true\)." count=".\($d["count"]??0\)."\\n"; $s=$d["data"][0]??null; if\($s\) echo "first: id={$s["id"]} name=".substr\($s["name"],0,40\)." rate={$s["rate"]} per1k={$s["price_per_1000"]} min={$s["min"]} max={$s["max"]} refill=".var_export\($s["refill"],true\)."\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$p=new PDO\("sqlite:./data/booster.db"\);$p->exec\("DELETE FROM orders WHERE external_order_id=\\"TESTREF1\\""\);$p->exec\("DELETE FROM support_tickets WHERE subject LIKE \\"Refill%\\""\);echo "cleaned. orders=".$p->query\("SELECT COUNT\(*\) c FROM orders"\)->fetch\(\)["c"]."\\n";')
